_doc: Objective corrections/additions to per-token costs and context limits. Keyed by model id. Each entry is shallow-merged over the upstream record, and flips that model's `source` to `patch`. Use ONLY for objective base costs published by the vendor — never selling-price markup. Costs are USD per token (floats), matching LiteLLM.

_example_remove_underscore_to_use._note: why this correction exists + source link

gemini-3.1-flash-lite-image._note: Paid Standard pricing: $0.25/M text/image/video input tokens, $1.50/M text/thinking output tokens, and $30/M image output tokens; Google publishes the 1K image equivalent as $0.0336. Source: https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/pricing (2026-07-14)

gemini-omni-flash-preview._note: Paid Standard pricing: $1.50/M input tokens, $9/M text output tokens, and $17.50/M video output tokens. Video output is billed at 5,792 tokens/s for 720p, yielding $0.10136/s. This preview model's availability may vary. Source: https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/pricing (2026-07-14)

veo-3.1-generate-001._note: Veo 3.1 Standard default video-with-audio price: $0.40/s at 720p and 1080p. 4K is $0.60/s and is not represented by this single default-rate field. Source: https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/pricing (2026-07-14)

veo-3.1-fast-generate-001._note: Veo 3.1 Fast default video-with-audio price: $0.10/s at 720p. 1080p is $0.12/s and 4K is $0.30/s; this single field records the default 720p rate. Source: https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/pricing (2026-07-14)

veo-3.1-lite-generate-preview._note: Veo 3.1 Lite default video-with-audio price: $0.05/s at 720p; 1080p is $0.08/s and 4K is unsupported. Source: https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/pricing (2026-07-14)

gpt-oss-120b._note: Open-weight model (Apache 2.0). No official API pricing — not served via OpenAI API, deployed via self-hosting or third parties. Source: https://platform.openai.com/docs/models/gpt-oss-120b (2026-05-31)

azure_ai/jais-30b-chat._note: LiteLLM upstream stores per-1K-token prices in the per-token field (off by 1000x). Official Azure Marketplace: $0.0032/1K input, $0.00971/1K output. Source: https://azuremarketplace.microsoft.com/en-us/marketplace/apps/core42.core42-jais30b-v3-chat-offer (2026-06-01)

watsonx/bigscience/mt0-xxl-13b._note: LiteLLM upstream stores per-1K-token prices in the per-token field (off by 1000x): 0.0005→5e-7, 0.002→2e-6. Official IBM WatsonX: $0.50/M input, $2.00/M output. Source: https://cloudprice.net/models/watsonx/bigscience/mt0-xxl-13b (2026-06-01, sourced from IBM docs)

watsonx/core42/jais-13b-chat._note: LiteLLM upstream stores per-1K-token prices in the per-token field (off by 1000x): 0.0005→5e-7, 0.002→2e-6. Official IBM WatsonX: $0.50/M input, $2.00/M output. Source: https://cloudprice.net/models/watsonx/core42/jais-13b-chat (2026-06-01, sourced from IBM docs)

_wandb_unit_error_note: The following 13 wandb/* entries have LiteLLM upstream data quality bugs: per-million-token prices were stored in the per-token field (off by 1e6). Corrected by dividing the raw value by 1,000,000. Values are plausible inference rates for the wandb.ai platform.

wandb/deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-R1-0528._note: Unit error in LiteLLM upstream (per-M stored as per-token). Corrected: 0.135→1.35e-7, 0.54→5.4e-7.

wandb/deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3-0324._note: Unit error in LiteLLM upstream. Corrected: 0.114→1.14e-7, 0.275→2.75e-7.

wandb/deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3.1._note: Unit error in LiteLLM upstream. Corrected: 0.055→5.5e-8, 0.165→1.65e-7.

wandb/meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct._note: Unit error in LiteLLM upstream. Corrected: 0.022→2.2e-8.

wandb/meta-llama/Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct._note: Unit error in LiteLLM upstream. Corrected: 0.071→7.1e-8.

wandb/meta-llama/Llama-4-Scout-17B-16E-I._note: Unit error in LiteLLM upstream. Corrected: 0.017→1.7e-8, 0.066→6.6e-8.

wandb/microsoft/Phi-4-mini-instruct._note: Unit error in LiteLLM upstream. Corrected: 0.008→8e-9, 0.035→3.5e-8.

wandb/openai/gpt-oss-120b._note: Unit error in LiteLLM upstream. Corrected: 0.015→1.5e-8, 0.06→6e-8.

wandb/openai/gpt-oss-20b._note: Unit error in LiteLLM upstream. Corrected: 0.005→5e-9, 0.02→2e-8.

wandb/Qwen/Qwen3-235B-A22B-Instruct-2507._note: Unit error in LiteLLM upstream. Corrected: 0.01→1e-8.

wandb/Qwen/Qwen3-235B-A22B-Thinking-2507._note: Unit error in LiteLLM upstream. Corrected: 0.01→1e-8.

wandb/Qwen/Qwen3-Coder-480B-A35B-Instruc._note: Unit error in LiteLLM upstream. Corrected: 0.1→1e-7, 0.15→1.5e-7.

wandb/zai-org/GLM-4.5._note: Unit error in LiteLLM upstream. Corrected: 0.055→5.5e-8, 0.2→2e-7.
